name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the feature explainer: a topic h1, an overview, prose sections (heading + body), and labeled code blocks. Sections and code blocks are rendered to repeated blocks before substitution.

slots.description: Short summary of what the feature does and how it flows.
Section heading. Repeat the heading + body block once per entry in the sections array (see shape).
Code block caption, e.g. a file path or label.
